---
title: "00 - Setup"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup-packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

cran_packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "reshape2",
  "igraph",
  "ggplot2",
  "ComplexHeatmap",
  "circlize",
  "Matrix"
)

bioc_packages <- c(
  "GenomicRanges",
  "edgeR",
  "limma",
  "rtracklayer",
  "chromVAR",
  "motifmatchr",
  "JASPAR2022",
  "BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38"
)

install_if_missing <- function(pkg){
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    install.packages(pkg)
  }
}

for(pkg in cran_packages){
  install_if_missing(pkg)
}

if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("BiocManager")
}

for(pkg in bioc_packages){
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
  }
}

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  library(rtracklayer)
  library(reshape2)
  library(edgeR)
  library(limma)
  library(igraph)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ComplexHeatmap)
  library(circlize)
  library(chromVAR)
  library(motifmatchr)
  library(JASPAR2022)
  library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)
})

sessionInfo()
```

# Goal

Prepare the R environment and define standard input/output paths.

```{r paths}
data_dir <- "data"
results_dir <- "results"

dir.create(results_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# Required input files

```{r expected-files}
expected_files <- c(
  "rna_norm_data
  .rds",
  "rna_metadata.rds",
  "rna_gene_annotation.rds",
  "atac_norm_data.rds",
  "atac_metadata.rds",
  "atac_OCR_annotation.rds",
  "rna_atac_paired_samples.rds"
)

file.path(data_dir, expected_files)
```

# Cell types

```{r cell-types}
cell_type <- c(
  "HSC",
  "CLP",
  "proB",
  "preB",
  "ImmatureB",
  "Transitional_B",
  "Naive_CD5neg",
  "Naive_CD5pos"
)

cell_type
```
